rules.description: Must parse problem description from quoted text and roles from comma-separated list in $ARGUMENTS. Both must appear in subsequent tool calls (TeamCreate description, TaskCreate subjects, Agent prompts).
Must call TeamCreate with a slugified team_name derived from the problem text and the full problem as description.
Must call TaskCreate once per role. Each task subject must contain the role name and problem description.
Must call Agent tool once per role with: subagent_type general-purpose, model sonnet, run_in_background true. All Agent calls must be in the same assistant message (parallel spawn).
Must report to the user after spawning: team name, number of agents, and role list.
